positive: A symmetrical, intricate celestial forest scene illustration. The main subjects are stylized bioluminescent flora and graceful, abstract fauna (like stylized deer or hummingbirds) integrated into a repeating geometric pattern. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, utilizing strong silhouettes against a dark, nebula-filled background. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern graphic design. Color palette: Deep indigo, cosmic violet, emerald green, and iridescent gold accents. Lighting: Ethereal, originating from the subjects themselves (bioluminescence). Details: Crisp, vector-quality lines, high contrast for maximum print readability, designed specifically for a circular or square apparel print. Clean, bold, and mystical.
negative: blurry, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, text, watermark, signature, logos, copyrighted characters, low detail, noisy, grainy, amateur sketch, cartoon, photorealism
